name: CycleTest
description: Application spec. Verifies the Issue<->Polecat cyclic observe pattern works end-to-end before MR and Worktree complicate the picture. Trigger sends Sling to Iss1; Pol1 advances Absent->Working via the observe-only path (per option C the SLING-receive path also exists but is unused here -- Pol1.SLING is bound to a stub that never sends to it). Iss1 advances Hooked->InProgress when Pol1 reaches Working; Pol1 advances Working->Done by sending MergeReady; Iss1 advances InProgress->Closed when Pol1 reaches Done; Pol1 advances Done->Idle when Iss1 reaches Closed. Both reach terminal: Iss1=Closed, Pol1=Idle. If the cycle deadlocks somewhere, we want to know before building more.

actors.name: MergeReadyReceiver
actors.owner: Stub. Receives Polecat's MergeReady so Pol1 can advance Working->Done.

invariants.description: Canary. SHOULD VIOLATE. Pol1 reaches Working via the observe-driven path (Trigger sends Sling to Iss1; Iss1 advances Open->Hooked; Pol1 observes issue=Hooked and advances Absent->Working).
Canary. SHOULD VIOLATE. Iss1 reaches Closed via the cyclic observe (Pol1 advances Working->Done by sending MergeReady; Iss1 observes polecat=Done and advances InProgress->Closed).
Canary. SHOULD VIOLATE. Pol1 reaches Idle (the persistent-polecat terminal) after Iss1 closes. Proves the full cycle terminates.
